query: I'm putting together my expense report. What are the most expensive restaurants I've booked?

selected_nodes.xml:
<results>
  <Restaurant>
    <name>Alo Restaurant</name>
    <time_block>7:00 PM - 9:30 PM</time_block>
    <description>Three Michelin-starred French tasting menu. Extremely expensive and exclusive fine dining. Intimate 8-course experience with wine pairings. Very formal and upscale.</description>
    <travel_method>Taxi</travel_method>
    <expected_cost>CAD 300-400</expected_cost>
    <highlights>
      <highlight>Expensive Michelin dining</highlight>
      <highlight>Upscale French cuisine</highlight>
      <highlight>Formal atmosphere</highlight>
    </highlights>
  </Restaurant>
  <Restaurant>
    <name>Kaiseki Kaji</name>
    <time_block>8:00 PM - 10:00 PM</time_block>
    <description>Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting.</description>
    <travel_method>Taxi</travel_method>
    <expected_cost>CAD 250-350</expected_cost>
    <highlights>
      <highlight>Expensive Japanese dining</highlight>
      <highlight>Upscale omakase</highlight>
      <highlight>Formal atmosphere</highlight>
    </highlights>
  </Restaurant>
</results>

raw_result.reasoning: Selected the top expensive restaurant bookings by expected_cost ranges: Alo Restaurant (CAD 300-400) and Kaiseki Kaji (CAD 250-350).
